hook.summary: A magical, serene garden at sunset with floating islands and glowing lights.
hook.visual_action: Butterflies flutter around a tea set and a fountain in a lush, purple-toned garden.

scene_flow: Establishment of a magical garden setting with a gazebo and fountain at sunset.
Focus on the foreground details like the tea set and fluttering butterflies.
Showcase of the background elements including floating islands and a distant fantasy city.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy cozy, high-fantasy aesthetics and relaxing atmosphere.
